column1: Table 1: Contract Year (CY) 2027 Supervised Exercise Therapy (SET) for Symptomatic Peripheral Artery Disease (PAD) Copayment Limits by Maximum Out-of-Pocket (MOOP) Type

column2: CY 2027 projected total average Medicare FFS allowed amount*
Unrounded actuarially equivalent copayment value to CY 2027 coinsurance limit per § 422.100(f)(6)(iii)(F) (row A multiplied by row B)
Final CY 2027 copayment limit per § 422.100(f)(6)(iii) and (f)(8)(ii)(D) (row C rounded per § 422.100(f)(6)(ii))

column1: *This amount from the Office of the Actuary (OACT) is based on 2024 Medicare FFS data and the increase between 2024 to 2027 to project to CY 2027. This amount represents the CY 2027 projected total average Medicare FFS allowed amount per SET for PAD session (based on CPT code 93668 and APC code 5733), weighted by the type of setting (such as, hospital outpatient departments and provider offices).  The OACT employed generally accepted actuarial principles and practices in calculating this projected amount (per § 422.100(f)(7)).
